# Resilient Mind

> Resilient Mind is an online membership program supporting expat women through emotional regulation, EFT (Emotional Freedom Techniques), expressive arts, and holistic therapies. Founded by Silvie Bogdanova, an expatriate of 13+ years, the program helps women living abroad transform loneliness, cultural stress, and uncertainty into emotional stability, self-trust, and inner safety.

## About

- **Founder:** Silvie Bogdanova — Art Expressive Therapist, expatriate of 13+ years (Czech Republic → Australia → Spain)
- **Audience:** Expat women navigating emotional challenges of living abroad
- **Approach:** EFT tapping, expressive art therapy, guided meditation, nervous system regulation
- **Format:** 12-month structured online membership with weekly video lessons, workbooks, and a private community
- **Languages:** English
- **Location:** Spain (online, serving globally)

## What we offer

- **Resilient Mind Membership** — 12-month guided program with monthly themes (loneliness, cultural stress, identity, boundaries, stability) including 4 weekly videos, 4 weekly workbooks, guided meditations, and EFT sessions. Basic Monthly €37, Premium Monthly €47 (includes private Skool community + Additional Hubs).
- **Free 7-Day Practice Kit** — Morning gratitude workbook, midday EFT tapping video and workbook, evening reflection. Free PDF + video.
- **Private 1:1 sessions** — Bookable consultations.
- **Workshops** — Live and recorded.
- **Endometriosis & Chronic Pain Hub** — Specialized content for women living abroad with chronic conditions.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://resilientmind.io/): Overview of Resilient Mind.
- [Membership (sales)](https://resilientmind.io/membership): Short-form sales page for the membership.
- [Resilient Hub (program details)](https://resilientmind.io/resilient-hub): 12-month program structure, monthly themes, and what's included.
- [Pricing](https://resilientmind.io/pricing): Basic and Premium membership plans.
- [About Silvie](https://resilientmind.io/about): Founder's background and methodology.
- [Free Guide](https://resilientmind.io/free-guide): Download the free 7-day practice kit.
- [Booking](https://resilientmind.io/booking): Book a private consultation.
- [Blog](https://resilientmind.io/blog): Articles on expat resilience, EFT, nervous system regulation.
- [Workshops](https://resilientmind.io/workshopy): Live and recorded workshops.
- [Endometriosis Hub](https://resilientmind.io/endometriosis-hub): Specialised support for chronic pain.

## Topics we cover

- Expat emotional wellbeing and resilience
- EFT (Emotional Freedom Techniques) tapping for stress and anxiety
- Nervous system regulation while living abroad
- Cultural adjustment, loneliness, and identity in expatriation
- Expressive art therapy as emotional processing
- Guided meditation and reflective practices
- Self-trust, inner stability, and emotional safety
- Endometriosis and chronic pain management for expat women
